issues.description: Generated search-index entities use localhost canonical URLs in current build artifacts.
issues.observedBehavior: Sample entities show canonicalUrl values like http://localhost:3000/... in machine-readable output.
issues.expectedBehavior: Canonical URLs should use production site origin in generated discovery/search artifacts.
issues.probableRootCause: Build-time canonical origin resolution falls back to localhost when production site URL is not enforced.
issues.deterministicRisk: Environment-dependent output can differ between local/CI and production builds.

issues.description: Sitemap uses new Date() for many lastModified values.
issues.observedBehavior: Sitemap metadata changes every build even when source content may not have changed.
issues.expectedBehavior: Stable timestamps should be derived from content/data freshness where possible.
issues.probableRootCause: Timestamp convenience pattern used broadly in sitemap generation.
issues.deterministicRisk: Repeated churn can affect crawl signaling and reviewability.

issues.description: Lint warnings are present in verify:vercel baseline.
issues.expectedBehavior: Verification baseline should be warning-clean for clearer regression signal.
issues.probableRootCause: Obsolete constants left after route/sitemap rollout changes.
issues.deterministicRisk: Warning noise can hide future regressions.

issues.description: Legacy compare route relies on static pair generation set and redirects to canonical compare pages.
issues.observedBehavior: Legacy pair validity depends on static params universe, requiring sync with sitemap eligibility.
issues.expectedBehavior: Pair eligibility should have a single source of truth reused by route and sitemap.
issues.probableRootCause: Legacy route retained for redirects while canonical route uses knowledge-backed pair set.
issues.deterministicRisk: Divergence risk if either pair source changes independently.

issues.description: Compare sitemap correctness currently depends on intersection logic and duplicated generation assumptions.
issues.observedBehavior: Sitemap now resolves correctly, but implementation is duplicated and regression-prone.
issues.expectedBehavior: Shared helper should define eligible compare pairs once.
issues.probableRootCause: Incremental fixes introduced local eligibility logic in sitemap.
issues.deterministicRisk: Future edits may reintroduce invalid compare URLs.

issues.description: Canonical strategy spans legacy and canonical families with redirect dependencies.
issues.observedBehavior: Legacy routes redirect cleanly now, but intent ownership is spread across multiple families.
issues.expectedBehavior: Canonical ownership and support-route behavior should remain centrally governed.
issues.probableRootCause: Historical layering of legacy route surfaces and newer canonical families.
issues.deterministicRisk: Future route edits can create canonical drift or duplicate intent.

issues.description: Discovery-page navigation is heavily manual and susceptible to drift.
issues.observedBehavior: Large hardcoded link lists require continuous manual consistency updates.
issues.expectedBehavior: Either generated registries or stronger automated checks for curated links.
issues.probableRootCause: Manual discovery UX curation across multiple pages.
issues.deterministicRisk: Low-to-moderate link drift risk over time.

issues.description: Discovery graph page positioning may imply fuller graph coverage than current lightweight JSON provides.
issues.observedBehavior: Public graph is concise/curated while page language presents broad relationship mapping.
issues.expectedBehavior: Scope language should explicitly frame graph as curated subset unless full graph is provided.
issues.probableRootCause: Content framing not updated with current graph footprint.

issues.description: Regenerated deterministic assets create very large diffs and review burden.
issues.observedBehavior: Routine verify/build regenerates many public assets and churn-heavy outputs.
issues.expectedBehavior: Review-friendly, intentionally scoped generated-output updates with clear provenance.
issues.probableRootCause: Broad regeneration scope and timestamp/version updates in generated artifacts.

issues.description: Global external analytics script is always included in layout head.
issues.observedBehavior: Runtime behavior depends on third-party availability for all pages.
issues.expectedBehavior: Explicit policy/environment control for optional external runtime dependencies.
issues.deterministicRisk: Low for build determinism, moderate for runtime variance.
